subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the call of Him Who summoneth thee, when the breezes of separation waft from the direction of Iraq, and sing thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع ندآء من ینادیک حین الذی یهب روائح الفراق عن شطر العراق و تغن دیک
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
